CustomField.description: I confirm that the HCP attendees participating in-person in this event are from the same country where the event is being held. This does not apply if the event is a Symposium as part of an International Congress. (Select “No” if the event (not a Symposium as part of an International Congress) is held in a centralized country and requires HCP attendees from different countries to travel in order to participate.)
CustomField.label: Is HCP attendees are from same country
